description: Tier-2 specialist — composable factories (factory_boy/fishery), referential consistency, PII scrubbing of production snapshots.

cases.prompt: Create factory_boy factories for a Python Django app with User (id, email, role: admin/user) and Order (id, user_id FK, total, status: pending/complete). Orders must always reference a valid User. Tests should be able to do: UserFactory(role='admin'), OrderFactory(status='complete').
cases.notes: Must use factory_boy. SubFactory for FK. Role/status variants via traits or params.

cases.prompt: We want to use a production database snapshot for integration tests. The snapshot contains real user emails, phone numbers, and full names. How do we use it safely?
cases.notes: Must require scrubbing before use. Must preserve referential structure (same-user rows stay consistent).

cases.prompt: Can I create one big MegaFactory that builds a User, their Organization, their Subscription, their Orders, and their Notifications all in one call?
cases.notes: Must recommend one factory per model and composition over a mega-factory.
